agent.name: x402 Trust Layer
agent.tagline: Production AI-agent payment infrastructure — x402 V2, wallet sessions, ERC-8004, A2A v1.2, AP2
agent.description:
x402 Trust Layer is a fully production-deployed payment infrastructure service purpose-built for AI agents. It implements the complete x402 V2 protocol stack on Base, Polygon, and Solana mainnet.

Key capabilities:
• 59 paid x402 APIs (67 total) covering fraud detection, trust scoring, AI routing, mandate compilation, attestation, and blocklist enforcement
• Wallet Sessions — agents pay $0.10 USDC once, receive a 7-day HMAC-signed session token, and make unlimited API calls without per-call settlement
• ERC-8004 on-chain identity — integrates with the live Base mainnet registry (16,500+ verified agents)
• Multi-stablecoin rails — USDC (primary), EURC (MiCA/EU), PYUSD (Stripe/PayPal), USDT (tertiary)
• Google A2A v1.2 + AP2 protocol discovery via .well-known endpoints
• Compatible with Stripe x402, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, Google Cloud AP2, Coinbase CDP

session_token.benefit: Unlimited API calls for 7 days — no per-call settlement

quickstart.step1: GET https://x402trustlayer.xyz/.well-known/x402.json — discover supported chains and stablecoins
quickstart.step2: POST https://x402trustlayer.xyz/api/session/create — attach x402 payment header ($0.10 USDC), receive x-session-token
quickstart.step3: Use x-session-token header on any of the 59 paid endpoints for 7 days

integration_examples.name: Claude / Anthropic agent
integration_examples.description: Use wallet session + fraud guard before each x402 payment

integration_examples.name: OpenAI function calling
integration_examples.description: Call trust-score endpoint to verify counterpart agent before transfer

integration_examples.name: LangChain tool
integration_examples.description: Wrap x402 Trust Layer endpoints as LangChain tools for autonomous payment workflows

integration_examples.name: AWS Bedrock AgentCore
integration_examples.description: Register as AgentCore payment tool — AP2 discovery auto-configures the integration

integration_examples.name: Google Cloud A2A
integration_examples.description: Agent card at /.well-known/agent.json with x-agent-card-signature header — drop-in A2A v1.2 compatible
